title: KLA Corp. (KLAC) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: KLA Corp.'s (KLAC) fiscal Q2 results reflect gains from increased customer demand across each of the major product groups. Also, growing investments in foundry & logic remain tailwinds.

title: KLA (KLAC) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: KLA (KLAC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.95% and 1.17%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Earnings Results: KLA Corp. stock drops following weak outlook
text: KLA Corp. shares fell in the extended session Thursday after the chip-equipment maker's weak outlook overshadowed its earnings beat for the quarter.

title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2022 Second Quarter Results
text: MILPITAS, Calif., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced operating results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2022, which ended on Dec. 31, 2021, and reported GAAP net income attributable to KLA of $717.4 million and GAAP earnings per diluted share attributable to KLA of $4.71 on revenue of $2.35 billion.

title: KLA Corp. (KLAC) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: KLA Corp.'s (KLAC) fiscal Q2 results might reflect gains from strong momentum in core markets and strength in wafer fabrication equipment. Yet, supply chain constraints might have been a concern.

title: KLA: Semiconductor Equipment Stock To Invest In For 2022
text: KLA is one of the five largest semiconductor equipment providers in the world and the clear market leader in process control (inspection and metrology), where the company consistently held market. KLA's successful service business model provides a steady recurring revenue stream that eliminates revenue volatility.
